message:
feat(block): add pluggable IoEngine trait for kernel-bypass I/O (bd-2jds)

Batch-submit I/O abstraction modeling io_uring submission/completion
queues. PreadPwriteEngine (default) and MemIoEngine (testing) provided.
Stats tracking per engine. VectoredBlockDevice can delegate to IoEngine
for true batched I/O when io_uring backend is added behind feature flag.
Also fixes pre-existing parking_lot .unwrap() in ffs-block tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
